message.content:
@startuml
title UML Sequence Diagram: Database Connection Pooling

participant "User" as User
participant "BaseExecutor" as BaseExecutor
participant "JdbcTransaction" as JdbcTransaction
participant "PooledDataSource" as PooledDataSource
participant "PooledConnection" as PooledConnection
participant "Proxy" as Proxy
participant "Connection" as Connection

participant "User" as User1
participant "BaseExecutor" as BaseExec1
participant "JdbcTransaction" as JdbcTrans1
participant "PooledDataSource" as PooledData1
participant "PooledConnection" as PooledConn1
participant "Proxy" as Proxy1
participant "Connection" as Conn1

User1 ..> BaseExec1 : getConnection
BaseExec1 ..> JdbcTrans1 : getConnection
JdbcTrans1 ..> PooledData1 : openConnection
PooledData1 ..> PooledConn1 : getConnection
PooledData1 ..> PooledConn1 : popConnection
PooledData1 ..> PooledConn1 : <create>
PooledConn1 ..> Proxy1 : newProxyInstance
Proxy1 ..> PooledConn1 : 创建Connection代理类对象
PooledConn1 ..> PooledData1 : 返回PooledConnection实例
PooledData1 ..> PooledConn1 : isValid
PooledConn1 ..> PooledData1 : pingConnection
PooledData1 ..> PooledConn1 : 检测连接是否有效
PooledData1 ..> PooledConn1 : 连接是否有效标识
PooledData1 ..> PooledConn1 : getProxyConnection
PooledConn1 ..> PooledData1 : 返回代理连接
JdbcTrans1 ..> PooledData1 : 返回代理连接
JdbcTrans1 ..> PooledData1 : setTransactionIsolation
PooledData1 ..> Connection : 设置隔离级别
JdbcTrans1 ..> PooledData1 : setDesiredAutoCommit
JdbcTrans1 ..> BaseExec1 : 设置提交模式
JdbcTrans1 ..> BaseExec1 : 获取连接
JdbcTrans1 ..> BaseExec1 : 通过jdbc获取数据库连接
BaseExec1 ..> User1 : 返回数据库连接

@enduml
